channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The skies for American Airlines are clearer than you think
item.description: Robert Isom is steering American Airlines through a very particular kind of turbulence.

item.title: ‘Mewgenics’ Just Set A Huge Steam Concurrent Playercount Record
item.description: Mewgenics performed well at launch, but its playercount has only increased, and it has just set a Steam concurrent record.

item.title: Victoria’s Secret CEO says new customers are embracing the escape provided by the glamorous brand: ‘We were living in a beige world for awhile’
item.description: Maximalism is back at Victoria's Secret.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Release Date Latest: New Prices And Deals
item.description: This Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra release date will see a new price strategy with a change to the pre-order deal.

item.title: Is Netflix’s New Top 10 Hit, ‘The Hunting Party,’ Worth Watching?
item.description: A new show has hit Netflix's top 10 list, THe Hunting Party, and you may be wondering if it's actually worth your time or not.

item.title: AI is transforming science – more researchers need access to these powerful tools for discovery
item.description: Five years ago, our AlphaFold AI system solved the 50-year grand challenge of protein structure prediction. But that's not the whole story.

item.title: Apple Confirms March 4 ‘Special Experience’ With New iPhone And Macs Tipped
item.description: Apple just made an announcement, much sooner than expected, for a special Apple experience. It looks like the iPhone 17e will be one of the new produc...

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Tuesday, February 17
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Lowe’s CEO used to make $4.35 an hour working at Target. His secret to climbing the corporate ladder was volunteering for jobs ‘nobody else wanted’
item.description: “I had to find a way to differentiate myself,” Marvin Ellison said.

item.title: As baby boomers are forced to ‘unretire’ because they’ve not saved enough, 6-year-olds in Germany will soon have retirement accounts
item.description: Millions of baby boomers can’t afford to retire. It’s a fate that Gen Alpha in Germany may never have to face under new plans.

item.title: The seeds of the dramatic selloff in AI losers were planted as far back as 2022
The stock market is reflecting fears of an AI apocalypse for white-collar jobs
Here are 7 charts guaranteed to stress you out about the stock market
Living alone? The 'singles tax' that costs $10K a year
item.description: Living alone costs Americans over $10,000 extra per year in what experts call a "singles tax," as apartment rents surge nationwide, new data reveals.

item.title: How a riptide around AI and stocks could affect Fed decisions and housing market
These ‘safer’ chip stocks have boomed this year. Is it too late to buy in?
Inflation eased slightly in January but remained well above the Fed's target
item.description: The Labor Department on Friday released the January 2026 consumer price index (CPI), which showed that inflation remained elevated above the Federal R...

item.title: SpaceX launches crew to International Space Station after prior team's medical evacuation
item.description: SpaceX and NASA launched a new crew to the International Space Station on Friday, around one month after a previous crew had to be brought home early.

item.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
item.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
